title: IMMZD2DTTyphoidTCV ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTTyphoidTCV ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 6 months-41
Client is not due for Typhoid vaccination-48
No typhoid primary series doses were administered-116
Client's age is between 6 months and 45 years-52
Client is due for Typhoid vaccination-44
Client's age is more than or equal to 45 years-41
Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note-66
One typhoid primary series dose was administered-116

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTTyphoidTCV ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTTyphoidTCVVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
